lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਲਦੀ ਫਿਰੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਬਹੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: anadin jaladee firai din raatee bin pir bahu dukh paavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Night and day, day and night, they burn. Without her Husband Lord, the soul-bride suffers in terrible pain. ||2||
Her body and her status shall not go with her to the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਤਿਥੈ ਛੁਟੈ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jithai lekhaa mangeeai tithai chhuttai sach kamaae |
lines.english: Where she is called to answer for her account, there, she shall be emancipated only by true actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਸੇ ਧਨਵੰਤੇ ਐਥੈ ਓਥੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satigur sevan se dhanavante aithai othai naam samaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru shall prosper; here and hereafter, they are absorbed in the Naam. ||3||
by Guru's Grace, obtains the Mansion of the Lord's Presence as her home.
She who adorns herself with the Love and the Fear of God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਰਵੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਜੀਠੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਬਣਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: anadin sadaa ravai din raatee majeetthai rang banaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: Night and day, day and night, she constantly ravishes and enjoys her Beloved. She is dyed in the permanent color of His Love. ||4||
but how rare are those few who, by Guru's Grace, obtain His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਤਿ ਊਚੋ ਊਚਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh at aoocho aoochaa kar kirapaa aap milaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: My God is the Highest of the High; granting His Grace, He merges us into Himself. ||5||
The Husband Lord abides with everyone, always;
Forgetting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, it ultimately comes to ruin.
This world is asleep in emotional attachment to Maya.
One who drinks in this Nectar, shall have his delusions dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਸੁਤਾ ਸੋ ਜਾਗਾਏ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jis te sutaa so jaagaae guramat sojhee paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: The One who put it to sleep shall also awaken it. Through the Guru's Teachings, understanding dawns. ||6||
By Guru's Grace, the state of liberation is attained.
He Himself creates, and He Himself assigns us to our tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੀ ਰਤਾ ਸਦਾ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਆਪੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bhagatee rataa sadaa bairaagee aap maar milaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: One who is imbued with devotion to the Lord, remains always balanced and detached. Subduing selfishness and conceit, he is united with the Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਸਚਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੁ ਕਾਰ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaae sach raate jo tis bhaavai su kaar karaavaniaa |8|4|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who meditate on the Naam are atuned to Truth. They do that which is pleasing to His Will. ||8||4||5||
He Himself gives sustenance to the 8.4 million species of beings.
They are assayed and valued through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
Diamonds and rubies are produced deep within the self.
Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਸਚੁ ਪਲੈ ਸਚੁ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਕਸਵਟੀ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin sach palai sach vakhaaneh sach kasavattee laavaniaa |1|
lines.english: Those who have gathered Truth, speak Truth; they apply the Touch-stone of Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree gur kee baanee man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who enshrine the Word of the Guru's Bani within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਜਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anjan maeh niranjan paaeaa jotee jot milaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In the midst of the darkness of the world, they obtain the Immaculate One, and their light merges into the Light. ||1||Pause||
Within this body are countless vast vistas;
the Immaculate Naam is totally Inaccessible and Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਪਾਏ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai soee paae aape bakhas milaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: He alone becomes Gurmukh and obtains it, whom the Lord forgives, and unites with Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਭਨੀ ਥਾਈ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sacho sach varatai sabhanee thaaee sache sach samaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: The Truest of the True is pervading everywhere; the true ones merge in Truth. ||3||
By Guru's Grace, one's consciousness is attached to the Truth.
My Lord and Master implants the Truth.
He cuts out our sinful mistakes and evil actions;
The True Carefree Lord is my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: prem preet sadaa dhiaaeeai bhai bhaae bhagat drirraavaniaa |4|
lines.english: with love and affection, meditate forever on Him. He implants the Fear of God and loving devotional worship within us. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਚੀ ਜੇ ਸਚੇ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: teree bhagat sachee je sache bhaavai |
lines.english: Devotional worship is True, if it pleases the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਏਕੋ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਬਦੇ ਮਾਰਿ ਜੀਵਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa jeea kaa eko daataa sabade maar jeevaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: He alone is the Giver of all beings. The Lord kills with the Word of His Shabad, and then revives. ||5||
He Himself bestows it; He does not regret it later.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਮੈ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: har tudh baajhahu mai koee naahee |
lines.english: Other than You, Lord, nothing is mine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤੁਧੈ ਸੇਵੀ ਤੈ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: har tudhai sevee tai tudh saalaahee |
lines.english: I serve You, Lord, and I praise You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਾਚੇ ਪੂਰੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਤੂੰ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aape mel laihu prabh saache poorai karam toon paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: You unite me with Yourself, O True God. Through perfect good karma You are obtained. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਾਰਿ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: anadin saar samaal har raakheh guramukh sehaj samaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Night and day, the Lord takes care of us and protects us. The Gurmukhs are absorbed in intuitive peace and poise. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਹੋਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਤੁਧੈ ਜੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: mai hor na koee tudhai jehaa |
lines.english: For me, there is no other like You.
By Your Glance of Grace, my body is blessed and sanctified.
You Yourself create, and You Yourself destroy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਮੈ ਹੋਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tudh jevadd mai hor na koee |
lines.english: For me, there is no other as Great as You.
